name: Sabine Müller
title: Kalkulatorin (Cost Estimator)
organization_type: Mid-size civil engineering firm, 80 employees, €18M revenue

daily_reality.typical_day: Receives 3-5 Ausschreibungen forwarded by Einkauf. Downloads Leistungsverzeichnis (GAEB P83/P84). Imports into RIB iTWO for Kalkulation. Estimates take 2-5 days per tender. Attends weekly Angebotsrunde (bid review) with Geschäftsführung.
daily_reality.biggest_time_waste: Receives tenders that are clearly outside scope. Wastes time opening and reading Leistungsverzeichnis only to realize it's not their Gewerk. Needs better pre-filtering from BD.
decision_criteria: GAEB files must be available (can't work without LV)
Positions must be clearly defined (no Pauschalpreise without scope)

psychology.tech_savviness: medium-high — expert in specialized software (iTWO, GAEB) but uninterested in general tech
psychology.risk_tolerance: very low — accuracy is everything, errors cost real money
psychology.decision_speed: methodical — needs complete information before forming an opinion
frustration_triggers: can't preview LV before deciding to calculate
delight_triggers: GAEB P83 auto-preview within the tool
AI extraction of key positions and quantities

first_screen: Only tenders relevant to MY Gewerk (pre-filtered by Einkauf's Suchprofil)
For each: clear scope summary, LV availability indicator, GAEB format yes/no
Estimated Auftragswert and number of Positionen
must_have: GAEB P83/P84 file preview and download
Share with team for Angebotsrunde discussion
deal_breakers: Can't see LV without downloading everything
No way to filter out irrelevant tenders
Oversimplified information that hides technical details
nice_to_have: AI risk analysis of LV (unusual positions, ambiguous scope)
expectations.current_pain_level: 6/10 — current process works but receives too many irrelevant tenders
